subject: Looks like I was billed twice
body: I upgraded once this morning but my card statement shows two charges from your company.

subject: Charged twice for monthly plan
body: We have two invoice emails and two identical card charges.

subject: Exported CSV contains garbled characters
body: Names with accents are coming through as broken characters in the CSV export.

subject: Duplicate charge and no refund confirmation
body: We were charged twice on the Pro annual plan and still have not received any refund timeline.

subject: Stuck in mobile login loop again
body: On mobile Safari the app keeps asking me to log in repeatedly and never holds the session cookie.

subject: Mobile sign-in redirects in circles
body: When I try signing in on my iPad, the app redirects between two pages and never lands me in the product.
